final:
// // This D flip-flop captures the input signal 'in' on the falling edge of the 'clock' when 'enable_l' is low (inactive). If 'reset' is asserted high, the output 'out' is reset to one. When 'enable_l' is high, the output maintains its previous state regardless of the 'in' signal.
module top_module(
  input in,
  input enable_l,
  input clock,
  input reset,
  output reg out
);always @(posedge clock or negedge reset) begin
  if (!reset) begin
    out <= 1'b0;
  end else if (!enable_l) begin
    out <= out;
  end else begin
    out <= in;
  end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This D flip-flop captures the input signal 'in' on the falling edge of the 'clock' when 'enable_l' is low (inactive). If 'reset' is asserted high, the output 'out' is reset to one. When 'enable_l' is high, the output maintains its previous state regardless of the 'in' signal.
